pi_items.source: Directly extracted from the explicitly provided first name in the task description text ('First Name: Arthur').
Directly extracted from the explicitly provided last name in the task description text ('Last Name: Pendelton').
Directly extracted from the explicitly provided specialty in the task description text ('Specialty: Endocrinology').
Directly extracted from the explicitly provided NPI in the task description text ('NPI: 1928374650'). Confirmed synthetic due to keyboard pattern and invalid Luhn checksum.

Extracted from the explicitly provided phone number in the task description text ('(555) 867-5309') after normalizing by removing non-digits. The 555 prefix and 867-5309 are classic fictional/synthetic placeholders.
Extracted from the explicitly provided fax number in the task description text ('(555) 867-5310') after normalizing by removing non-digits. Confirmed synthetic.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructs the agent to create a new referring physician record using explicitly provided, synthetic data. The verified values (First Name: Arthur, Last Name: Pendelton, Specialty: Endocrinology, NPI: 1928374650, Phone: 5558675309, Fax: 5558675310) accurately reflect the instructions given in the task description. The data uses fictional placeholders, including a '555' phone prefix, an '867-5309' song reference, and a mathematically invalid NPI based on an alternating numeric keyboard sequence.
